pull-request-header: :robot: Release PR. Merging it pushes the version tag, which publishes the ghcr.io Docker image and the MCP registry entry.
pull-request-footer: Squash-merge with the title above unchanged — the title becomes the release commit. To ship a different version, do not edit this PR; land an empty commit on main with a `Release-As: x.y.z` footer and this PR will retarget.
